name: Stats core
summary: Implement the next downstream command: pairtools-compatible stats for stable small-fixture counts.
goal: Implement oracle-tested `pairs-rs stats` for small pairs inputs with stable pair count and pair_type count parity.
explicit_non_goals: Do not implement dedup, split, restrict, phase, sample, scaling, filterbycov, or parse2 behavior.
Do not implement every pairtools stats report field in one milestone.
Do not change parse, sort, select, or merge behavior.
Do not benchmark or claim speedup.
acceptance_criteria: `pairs-rs stats` matches selected stable pairtools stats fields on committed small pairs fixtures.
`-o/--output` writes stats to a file and stdout is used when output is omitted.
Unsupported stats options fail loudly with `not implemented`.
known_risks: Pairtools stats emits many derived sections; M130 must scope exact fields before implementation.
